reviews.comment:
excelente atencion a los viajeros, muy buen restaurant, comodo, rapido ,atentos a solucionar tus problemas, muy buen lugar von vistas al rio colorado, los motociclistas viajeros como quien escribe, agradecidos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service to travelers, very good restaurant, comfortable, fast, attentive to solving your problems, very good place with views of the Colorado River, traveling motorcyclists like the one writing, grateful
